commands.repair_reason: No repair lane candidate: the remaining action is normal maintainer/CI validation for an active, user-facing and security-sensitive feature PR.; Cleared: No concrete remaining security or supply-chain defect found in the diff after the wget body-credential fix; the broad approval-summarizer surface still deserves maintainer scrutiny before merge. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opt-in `approvals.plugin.language` config with `original`, `simple`, and `simple-technical` plugin approval wording, wires it through shared, Telegram, and Matrix approval rendering, and adds config/docs/tests plus generated baseline updates.

Reproducibility: not applicable. for a current-main bug: this PR adds a new opt-in approval language mode. Current main source inspection confirms only the raw plugin approval text exists today.
